message:
feat(cli): Add export-html command for beautiful session exports

Adds a new `cass export-html` command that generates self-contained,
browser-viewable HTML files from session transcripts:

Options:
- --encrypt / --password: Web Crypto compatible encryption
- --password-stdin: Secure password input (no shell echo)
- --no-cdns: Fully offline mode (larger file)
- --theme dark|light: Default color scheme
- --include-tools: Show tool calls (default: true)
- --show-timestamps: Display message timestamps
- --dry-run / --explain: Preview without writing
- --open: Launch in browser after export
- --json: Machine-readable output for automation

This completes the HTML export story - sessions can now be shared
as beautiful, optionally encrypted HTML files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
